name: Menhaden (SS-377)
events: 27 Jul 1945 USS Menhaden (Cdr. D.H. McClintock, USN) departed New Orleans, Louisiana for the Panama Canal Zone.
1 Aug 1945 USS Menhaden (Cdr. D.H. McClintock, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone.
1 Sep 1945 After a period of training USS Menhaden (Cdr. D.H. McClintock, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
16 Sep 1945 USS Menhaden (Cdr. D.H. McClintock, USN) arrived at Pearl Harbor from the Panama Canal Zone.
